reason: Offline keyword 'minori' over-fired on a soft G7 principles communiqué — not an Annex III product duty.
AgID Academy training catalogue is capacity-building content; EUR-Lex-style 'digitale' heuristic wrongly pulled it into high-risk corpus.
Ausl/sanità digitale AI deployment sits in health Annex III territory; offline news-tone default under-scored it as minimal.
School AI information request implicates education-sector use-cases; rules missed education signals and left the tier at minimal.
Corrigendum is technical errata to the AI Act, not a new risk classification; CELEX parent-Act heuristic over-applied 'high'.
Character.AI sanction is primarily GDPR/age-verification on a chatbot; limited (transparency) fits better than Annex III high until product duties are shown.
OECD page describes the EU regulatory framework at policy level; tagging the whole overview as high conflates description with Annex III obligations.
Workplace emotion/stress monitoring warning is closer to prohibited emotion inference at work than generic high-risk HR tooling.
